{{Quote|Grath! Bring up the turbocannon!|[[Baddon Fass]]|<ref name="Duel on Nar Shaddaa" />}}
A '''turbocannon''' was a type of [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]]. The [[Death-Hunter Cyborg]], created by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Operation Death-Hunter]] project, carried a prototype turbocannon.<ref name="Death-Hunter" /> During [[Operation Shadow Hand]], the [[darktrooper]] [[Grath (dark trooper)|Grath]] carried a turbocannon.<ref name="Duel on Nar Shaddaa" />

{{Weapon-stub}}
